# RokdBot - Complete Service Documentation

## Company
RokdBot is a Vietnamese-based game bot service provider specializing in Rise of Kingdoms (RoK) automation. We operate a "farm-for-me" model where we run bots on our cloud servers on behalf of customers. No software installation is required by the customer.

## Target Audience
- Rise of Kingdoms players who want to automate resource gathering
- Players maintaining multiple farm accounts
- International and Vietnamese players
- Both free-to-play and paying players who want to optimize their gameplay

## Service Model
Unlike competitors who sell bot software licenses (requiring customers to run bots on their own PCs), RokdBot operates as a managed service:
1. Customer purchases a package
2. Customer provides their game account credentials via Discord/Zalo
3. Our team configures and runs the bot on our servers
4. Bot runs 24/7 with anti-detection measures
5. Customer receives periodic progress reports

## Detailed Feature List

### Resource Gathering
- Automatic RSS gathering on the map (food, wood, stone, gold)
- Smart node selection to avoid conflict
- Auto return to city when march is full
- Support for multiple marches simultaneously

### Gem Farming
- Auto gem gathering in home kingdom (~3,000-4,000 gems/day)
- Optimized gem routes in KvK map (~5,000-8,000 gems/day)
- Random coordinate generation for safety

### Troop Management
- Auto train troops (all types)
- Auto heal wounded troops
- Auto use speedups when configured

### City Development
- Auto upgrade buildings in priority order
- Auto research technology
- Building queue optimization

### Daily Tasks
- Auto collect daily rewards
- Auto collect quest rewards
- Auto collect alliance gifts
- Auto alliance help
- Auto kill barbarians for events
- Auto join rallies (configurable)

### Safety Features
- Human-like behavior simulation (random delays, varied click patterns)
- Session duration randomization
- Anti-captcha solving (2Captcha integration)
- IP rotation per account
- No shared resources between accounts

## Pricing Structure

| Package | Price (VND) | Price (USD) | Duration | Accounts | Key Features |
|---------|-------------|-------------|----------|----------|--------------|
| Trial | 150,000 | ~$6 | 7 days | 1 | Basic auto farm, new customers only |
| Basic | 750,000 | ~$30 | 30 days | 1 | Full auto farm + gather gems |
| Premium | 900,000 | ~$36 | 30 days | 1 | Custom strategy + events + priority support |
| Ultimate | 1,200,000 | ~$48 | 30 days | 2-3 | Multi-account + VIP + weekly reports |

## Payment
- VietQR: Instant bank transfer via dynamic QR code (HD Bank). Auto-confirmed via SePay webhook.
- PayPal: International payments via PayPal.me link.

## Support Channels
- Discord: https://discord.gg/UPuFYCw4JG (primary)
- Zalo: https://zalo.me/g/rqgqyd878 (Vietnamese customers)
- Response time: typically within 1-2 hours

## Competitors
- ROK Bot Service (rokbotservice.com) - $15-35/acc, cloud hosted
- BoostBot (boostbot.org) - Free/$15 Pro/$8 farm-for-me
- PrimeBot (primebot.org) - Free/$15 Premium
- GNBots (gnbots.com) - License-based

## Differentiation
- Best UX: anonymous purchase, 2-click checkout, instant QR payment
- Vietnam-native payment (VietQR)
- No software download needed
- Competitive pricing for Vietnamese market
- Professional dark-themed UI
